prompt_replacements.old: For a positive review, include every required request parameter with no default. Include an optional request parameter only when it performs the lookup.
prompt_replacements.new: For a positive review, include every required request parameter with no default. Include an optional request parameter only when it performs the lookup. For PRIMARY_KEY, a positive route must take lookup_text as the canonical_result component. A route that takes only other request parameters is negative, even if its response returns the canonical key.
